name: AnalysisPart
summary: The AnalysisPart class contains information related to analysis parts.

constructors.name: AnalysisPart
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisPart class.

methods.name: Add(AnalysisArea)
methods.summary: Adds an analysis area to the analysis part.

methods.name: Add(AnalysisBar)
methods.summary: Adds an analysis bar to the analysis part.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes an analysis part. The method is not implemented.

methods.name: DeleteAnalysisPart
methods.summary: Deletes the analysis part by ID.

methods.name: GetAnalysisAreas
methods.summary: Gets the analysis areas of the analysis part.

methods.name: GetAnalysisBars
methods.summary: Gets the analysis bars of the analysis part.

methods.name: GetAnalysisVolumes
methods.summary: Gets the analysis volumes of the analysis part.

methods.name: GetMainParts
methods.summary: Get the main analysis parts of this analysis part. There are no main analysis parts if this is not a sub analysis part.

methods.name: GetSubParts
methods.summary: Get the sub analysis parts of this analysis part. There are no sub analysis parts if this is not a main analysis part.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts a new analysis part into the Tekla Structures model. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: IsMainPart
methods.summary: Check if this analysis part is a main analysis part (has sub analysis parts).

methods.name: IsSubPart
methods.summary: Check if this analysis part is a sub analysis part.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis part. The ID, or the PartID and the AnalysisModelName, has to be set.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis part. The ID, or the PartID and the AnalysisModelName, has to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisAreas
properties.summary: The analysis areas of the analysis part.

properties.name: AnalysisBars
properties.summary: The analysis bars of the analysis part.

properties.name: AnalysisDesignCode
properties.summary: The analysis design code of the analysis part.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: AnalysisPartAnalysisProperties
properties.summary: The analysis part analysis properties.

properties.name: AnalysisPartAreaAttributes
properties.summary: The analysis part area attributes.

properties.name: AnalysisPartBarAttributes
properties.summary: The analysis part bar attributes.

properties.name: AnalysisPartCompositeProperties
properties.summary: The analysis part composite properties.

properties.name: AnalysisPartLoadingProperties
properties.summary: The analysis part loading properties.

properties.name: AnalysisPartPositionProperties
properties.summary: The analysis part position properties.

properties.name: AnalysisPartSpanningProperties
properties.summary: The analysis part spanning properties.

properties.name: AnalysisType
properties.summary: The analysis type of the analysis part.

properties.name: AnalysisVolumes
properties.summary: The analysis volumes of the analysis part.

properties.name: CoordinateSystem
properties.summary: The coordinate system of the analysis part.

properties.name: Curvature
properties.summary: The curvature of the analysis part.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: LoadBearingOrder
properties.summary: The load bearing order.

properties.name: Material
properties.summary: The material of the analysis part.

properties.name: OverrideProfile
properties.summary: The override profile of the analysis part. In case of tapered profile, only the name is available, and more details are available in the start/end properties of the analysis members.

properties.name: PartID
properties.summary: The identifier of the physical part.

properties.name: PartName
properties.summary: The name of the physical part.

properties.name: PartType
properties.summary: The type of the physical part.

properties.name: Profile
properties.summary: The profile of the analysis part. Note: OverrideProfile may exist to replace this. In case of tapered profile, only the name is available, ID is 0 and values are not returned. More details are available in the start/end properties of the analysis members.

properties.name: SnapDistance
properties.summary: The snap distance. Use 0.0 for manual connectivity, positive value for automatic connectivity.

properties.name: UpDirection
properties.summary: The up direction of the analysis part (in the global coordinate system). The axis vector (connecting member end nodes) and the up direction vector define the local XY plane of the member. The local Z can be calculated as localZ = localX x UpDirection (cross product), and after this localY = localZ x localX (cross product).
